title: Merge Cell is causing Excel Issue.
author: RastogiNishant
body:
### Discussed in https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/discussions/2011
Originally posted by **RastogiNishant** March 16, 2022 Hey There, I'm using exceljs lib on the frontend, in which I need to show something like as below. First Row --> Column 1 will have empty name (A1), Column 2-7(B1-G1) will be merged cell having some name. Second Row --> Column 1 will have Serial Number (A2), Column 2-7 will have different header for each B2-G2. So if I use merge cell then after opening the excel, I got an alert saying that 'We found a problem with some content in FileName.xlsx. Do you want us to try to recover as much as we can?. If we select yes then it works fine, however If I don't user mergeCell then it works fine but the requirement is not achieved in that case?. Please suggest, how can I proceed further. Sharing Snap as well. Snap 1(Requirement) as below -- Snap 2 (Error) as below -

comments.author: Slash214
comments.body: Hello, I have also encountered this warning at present, and would like to ask whether you have solved it?

comments.author: RastogiNishant
comments.body: @Slash214 I added empty text in column and then I merge it with mergeCell. For example. A1 = 'ID' B1 = '' C1 = 'Location' D1 = '' upto H1 = '' `const row = ['ID', '', 'Location', '', '', '', '', '']` `worksheet.addRow(row)` then I just called mergeCell as below in order to merge the header and centralised the text. ``` const mergeColumnAsHeader = (instance, fromCell, toCell) => { const cellAlignment = { horizontal: 'center', vertical: 'middle' } const mergeColumns = (sheetRef) => { sheetRef.mergeCells(fromCell, toCell) sheetRef.getCell(fromCell).style.alignment = cellAlignment } instance && mergeColumns(instance) } ``` Calling the method as `mergeColumnAsHeader(worksheet, 'A1', 'B1')` It worked for me, hope it will solve your issue as well.

comments.author: Slash214
comments.body:
Thank you very much for your answer, which is very helpful to me. 
At the same time,
I find that my problem is to add the warning of the emergence of tables.
If   worksheet. AddRows (data) is used to generate and merge, 
there will be no warning of Excel flavor. Thank you very much
